prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约18033名，2024年大幅前移至约8899名（前移约9134名），2025年继续前移至约7323名（前移约1576名）。近两年位次持续前移，但提升幅度明 显收窄，2025年基准位次约7323名。；该校在新疆理科招生计划2023年20人、2024年20人、2025年19人、2026年19人 ，2026年与2025年计划持平，未出现扩招或缩招，对竞争格局无直接冲击。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第80名，近年 排名稳定在79-83名区间，学校层次稳固；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端事件（学生盗用他人作品参赛、开除涉学术不端学生），可能对部分 考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；2025年周期亦有偏负面信号（热门专业投档线暴跌）；抖音热度排名第77位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低；第五轮学 科评估中管理科学与工程获评A级，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；与招生专业中的工商管理（商业智能）、电子商务等存在关联，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 招生专业以工科与管理类为主，近年工科类专业社会热度总体平稳；新疆2025年理科考生约52538人，2026年总考生数约238000人（含不确定标记），按近年理科占比约68.6% 估算，2026年理科考生约16.3万人，考生规模扩大可能加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移但幅 度收窄、2026年招生计划持平、声誉偏负面可能抑制部分报考热情、考生规模扩大等因素，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准7323名基础上小幅后移，预测最低位次约7423名，区 间6923-7923名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2023 was approximately 18033, which significantly advanced to about 8899 in 2024 (an advance of about 9134), and continued to advance to about 7323 in 2025 (an advance of about 1576). Rankings have been advancing in the past two years, but the improvement has narrowed noticeably. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7323. The university's enrollment plan for science in Xinjiang was 20 in 2023, 20 in 2024, 19 in 2025, and 19 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, and no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 80th, with recent rankings stable in the 79-83 range, indicating a solid university level. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents (students plagiarizing others' works for competitions, expelling students involved in academic misconduct), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. The 2025 cycle also had somewhat negative signals (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors). Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with an average evaluation, and short video platform exposure is moderately low. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A- or above discipline at the university. This is related to the enrollment majors such as Business Administration (Business Intelligence) and E-commerce, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The enrollment majors are mainly engineering and management, with social popularity of engineering majors generally stable in recent years. In 2025, there were about 52538 science candidates in Xinjiang, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 238000 (including uncertain markers). Based on the recent science proportion of about 68.6%, the estimated number of science candidates in 2026 is about 163,000. The expansion of the candidate pool may intensify competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous advancement of historical rankings but narrowing improvement, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the somewhat negative reputation that may suppress some application enthusiasm, and the expansion of the candidate pool, it is expected that the lowest ranking in 2026 will slightly retreat from the 2025 baseline of 7323. The predicted lowest ranking is about 7423, with a range of 6923-7923.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6923-7923, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 Traffic Engineering as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6923), you can focus on sprinting for Traffic Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>7923), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors.
